results.label: Fragmented appetite & medication request
results.input: JAP: wakatta waktta jya sono kusuri o kudasi ima ni mo watashi ni mo kigata no nai desu kara

results.label: Improved condition vs persistent nausea/dizziness
results.input: JAP: sensei. konichi taicho yokunatta genki aru to demo omoimasu memai ga kibun warukute taberarenakatta

results.label: Merged lifestyle query (smoking/drinking)
results.input: JAP: kitsueninshu tabako ha arimasu ka

results.label: Illicit substance query (misspelled)
results.input: JAP: marijuana cokain krauku nado sesshushiteimasu ka

results.label: Greetings + physical exam (knee stiffness)
results.input: JAP: konichika genki sou de naniyoridesune. suzugo hisa wo mageyou to suru toki ni kowabari wo kanjimasu ka

results.label: Mental health/Neurological (concentration)
results.input: JAP: shuinbun wo yondari miru koto shuuchu dekimasen ka

results.label: Motor symptoms / Restlessness
results.input: JAP: hoka no hito ni ugoitari hanshitari no ga osokute kitdukaremashitaka ochitsukuganaku mata ha sowasowa takusan ogoitemasuka

results.label: Injected drug history
results.input: JAP: kako ni ninen inai ni duragu ka yakubutsu ya ihou yaku btsu wo shiyou shita mata ha chuushabari koto arimasu ka arimasuka

results.label: Diagnostic tests for numbness
results.input: JAP: kensa ga hitsuyou desu. ashi no shibire no ga gein waranai desu w. gein no kekka dettara wo kitsutomerraru deshou

results.label: Transplant rejection / medication adherence
results.input: JAP: sshoku seikou shimashita karada ga kyousetsu hanou chubakaku shohou sareta subete kusuru chisai no jikan ni fukuyou shitekudasai

results.label: Screening for suicidal ideation
results.input: JAP: shindahouga mashi da to kangaetari nanninaka no houde kangaetari suru koto ha arimasu ka

results.label: History of chronic lung disease (asthma/COPD/pneumonia)
results.input: JAP: genzai mata kako ni ikano jyoutai ni natta koto arimasu ka zensoku mansei heisoku haishikkan haien

results.label: Post-prandial fullness / Weight issues
results.input: JAP: hai asa no chozen shoku go mainichi nondemasu uchi gakkoukara kaettekite gohan wo iwaretayouni tabesasetakara demo saikin jibun amari taberarenakute sugu onaka ga ippai ni natte shimaimsu sukoshi taberu dake de sugu

results.label: Severe symptoms (nausea, fatigue, dizziness, melaena)
results.input: JAP: nnnn hakike hidoi no to hirokan dake desu ato yoko ni natte okiagru toki ya tatte suwatte tachi agaru toki ni chotto memai surun desu onaka mo katai kanji shite itsumo i ga itai desu senjyutsu kuroi ben deta desu ga nani ka warui koto da to omoimasu ka

results.label: Next appointment / Recital context
results.input: JAP: wakatta sensei kore ijyou waruknai ranai to iino desu ga sugi no youyaku itsu desuka saisho chichi no hi de hapyoukai aru no de
